title: How to build a studio-to-street capsule
summary: A short guide to choosing activewear that works for training, errands and recovery.
content: Start with a supportive base layer, add a breathable top, then finish with an easy outer layer. Choose colors that mix cleanly and fabrics that keep their shape after movement.
author: ATHORA Studio

title: The fabric details that matter during high-impact training
summary: Compression, moisture management and seam placement can change how confident you feel.
content: For high-impact sessions, look for bonded seams, secure straps and fabrics that recover quickly. Good support should feel close without feeling restrictive.
author: Mira Wells

title: Recovery dressing for better off-days
summary: Soft layers and relaxed fits help your body reset while keeping your day polished.
content: Recovery outfits should be warm, breathable and easy to move in. Joggers, tanks and soft layers can support rest without looking unfinished.
author: ATHORA Journal
